Hi________, 

  

    Welcome to the UMGCCC FlowCore! The training process for our facility begins with first viewing the lecture created by our Director, Dr. Xiaoxuan Fan, you can find the lecture here.  Once you have viewed the flow lecture, please create an account on iLabs to schedule training sessions.  Training sessions are booked for one hour with a maximum of 10 samples to include: unstained cells, single color controls (on cells or beads) and any additional samples as you need.  Typically, training is completed after 3 assisted use sessions to make sure you can run the instrument on your own. 

  

   If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out, we look forward to working with you. 

  

-Your FlowCore Team
